latest_known_good_entity_counts.title: Known-good LINT fixture: latest AOP count
latest_known_good_entity_counts.description: Minimal positive methodology fixture; counts AdverseOutcomePathway instances in the latest snapshot via __GRAPH_URI__ substitution.
latest_known_good_entity_counts.data_source: Synthetic SPARQL query against the latest dated named graph; uses the __GRAPH_URI__ marker which the lint substitutes at runtime.
latest_known_good_entity_counts.limitations: Not a real plot query; exists only as a frozen positive-case test fixture and must NOT be added to static/data/methodology_notes.json.
latest_known_good_entity_counts.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(?aop) AS ?count) WHERE { GRAPH __GRAPH_URI__ { ?aop a aopo:AdverseOutcomePathway } }
